---
title: "About Me"
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-section">
  <div class="about-grid">

    <div class="about-photo-col">
      <img src="assets/profile.jpg" alt="Mo Boroumand" class="about-photo"
           onerror="this.src='https://via.placeholder.com/260x260/1a237e/ffffff?text=MB'">
    </div>

    <div class="about-text-col">
      <h2>Hi, I'm Mo 👋</h2>
      <p>
        I'm a platform-focused product leader with 18+ years of experience building and scaling integration
        frameworks, data pipelines, API ecosystems, and shared services infrastructure. I thrive at the
        intersection of deep technical understanding and strategic product thinking.
      </p>
      <p>
        I co-founded Didehbannet ISP in Iran, where I built a proprietary CRM platform with multi-system
        API integrations, supported 50,000+ POS terminal connections, and delivered high-availability services
        at enterprise scale over 18 years. I'm now the Founder & CEO of Mobosoft Inc. in San Diego, building
        cloud infrastructure and API-driven products.
      </p>
      <p>
        I'm currently completing my MS in Business Analytics at UC San Diego – Rady School of Management
        (Dec 2026), adding data science and machine learning depth to my platform engineering background.
        I'm passionate about solving complex integration challenges and building products that scale.
      </p>

      <h3>What I work with</h3>
      <ul>
        <li>Platform & Integration: API Lifecycle Management, Integration Frameworks, Data Pipelines</li>
        <li>Product Management: Roadmapping, Agile/Scrum, Cross-functional Leadership</li>
        <li>Data & Analytics: Python, SQL, Machine Learning, GIS/Mapbox, Business Intelligence</li>
        <li>Infrastructure: AWS/VPS, Cloud Architecture, Linux/Ubuntu, High-Availability Systems</li>
      </ul>

      <h3>Connect with me</h3>
      <div class="social-links">
        <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/mohamad-boroumand" class="social-btn linkedin">
          <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
        </a>
        <a href="mailto:mohamad.boroumand@gmail.com" class="social-btn email">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i> mohamad.boroumand@gmail.com
        </a>
        <a href="tel:858-947-2222" class="social-btn phone">
          <i class="bi bi-telephone-fill"></i> 858-947-2222
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```
